prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data, advanced financial models, or the ability to predict future stock prices with certainty. This prediction is based on a simplified model assuming a random walk for the stock price over one day, where the point estimate is the current price ($120.77). The confidence intervals are derived using a hypothetical daily volatility of approximately 1.26% (calculated from an assumed annual volatility of 20% for a large-cap stock) and standard normal distribution Z-scores. Stock prices are highly unpredictable, and actual movements can vary significantly from this estimation due to numerous market factors, company news, and economic indicators.
